intro: ^(Just once more, I’ll let myself go. It's just Kazumi.)
^Is me being in my academic weapon era that unbelievable...?!
^(As if she isn't the one I'm constantly competing with in most subjects...)
^It’s good, biology is actually really interesting when you get into it.
^I do miss art club, though. I’m sure you’re oh-so lonely without me.
^Ka-kaw! You're gonna have a heart attack!
^For the last time, I said I’ve got this.
^How can you study like this? Your heart keeps going…
^What do you want? I already did as I was asked.
^If you get it off of your chest, you can focus better! Time to confess! Time to confess!
^It’s not that easy. With Kazumi, I…
^Kaw… your head is somewhere else completely!
^Hypothesis: If you confess, then you’ll return to normal!
^And what if I ruin everything? Do you think that would help me focus?
^But the thought of never trying scares me, too.
^Truly, nothing could supersede the vibrance of hues painted with pure, dripping emotion.
^As beautiful as it is, your turbulence has shrouded the place in a cloud of darkness.
^I have yet to even lift my brush, dear.
choice1: ^I’m sorry. I can’t keep running away from myself.
choice2: ^It’s always just a waste of time… there’s nothing to think about.
^I’m afraid the clouds may even reach the laboratory.
